features.name: Beast of Burden
features.description: The mule counts as one size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Pack Animal - Load-bearing transport with defensive capability
tactical_info.positioning: Primarily non-combat, uses hoof attacks when threatened
tactical_info.damage_output: 4 bludgeoning per hit, basic defensive strikes
tactical_info.key_abilities: Beast of Burden increases carrying capacity significantly
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low AC and combat capability, primarily utility creature
tactical_info.synergies: Essential for expeditions, cargo transport, and overland travel
